allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const p=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''node_modules/@noble/hashes/package.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''version:'', p.version\); console.log\(''exports:'', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(p.exports||{}\)\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { sha256 } from ''@noble/hashes/sha2''; import { hmac } from ''@noble/hashes/hmac''; import { bytesToHex } from ''@noble/hashes/utils''; const h = sha256\(new TextEncoder\(\).encode\(''test''\)\); console.log\(''sha256 ok:'', bytesToHex\(h\)\); const hm = hmac\(sha256, new TextEncoder\(\).encode\(''key''\), new TextEncoder\(\).encode\(''msg''\)\); console.log\(''hmac ok:'', bytesToHex\(hm\)\);")
